title: glandularia spectabilis
intro: Glandularia spectabilis, also known as Verbena or Rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been utilized in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Glandularia spectabilis include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
